item.description:
Location:
Description:

Deleum Group is a leading Malaysian oil & gas services company with decades of experience supporting major energy projects across Southeast Asia and beyond. We do not just hire manpower — we invest in people who want to grow with us long-term.

Why Deleum?

  • Direct career path — we promote from within, not outsource your future

  • International project exposure — work on platforms, rigs, and offshore installations across Asia-Pacific

  • Full GWO & OPITO training support — we certify you, not bill you

  • Competitive offshore packages — rotation schedules, accommodation, and transport covered

  • HSE-first culture — safety is not a poster on the wall, it is how we operate every day

Our Culture — Work Hard, Live Right

We are not a faceless contractor. Deleum runs an in-house Sports & Recreation club with regular events and team activities. We believe a healthy crew is a safe crew — work-life balance is policy, not a promise. Our people work as a family, not as replaceable units.

Who We Need:

  • Offshore technicians & mechanics

  • Rigging & lifting specialists

  • Scaffolding supervisors & inspectors

  • Coating & surface treatment experts

  • HSE officers & advisors

  • QA/QC inspectors (welding, coating, structural)

  • Marine crew & logistics coordinators

  • Instrumentation & electrical technicians

  • Rope access technicians (IRATA certified)

  • Project engineers & site supervisors

What You Bring:

  • Relevant offshore certifications (BOSIET, GWO, IRATA, CSWIP, NACE, etc.)

  • Experience on oil & gas platforms, FPSOs, rigs, or marine construction projects

  • Commitment to HSE standards — zero compromise

  • Willingness to learn and lead — we train leaders, not followers

Deleum Shared Values:

  • Service Quality — deliver once, deliver right

  • HSE Integrity — every person home safe, every rotation

  • Sustainability — long-term thinking in a short-term industry

Unsolicited applications welcome. If you are motivated, competent, and ready for accountability — we want to hear from you.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Build a Career, Not Just a Contract at Deleum Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Your CV in the Right Hands — Since 2005

Mercator Crewing started as Norwegian Maritime Services AS in 2005 and rebranded in 2019. Nearly two decades later, we are a global crewing and payroll provider with offices in Norway, Poland, Lithuania, the Philippines, and the UK — and a network that covers every major shipping region.

What We Do:

  • Full crew management — short-term single positions or long-term complete crew packages

  • Employment agency services — we hire out mariners across all ranks and vessel types

  • Global payroll — offshore and onshore personnel, handled accurately and on time

  • Training partnerships — our overseas offices work with local maritime academies; in Norway we collaborate with SIMSEA REAL OPERATIONS for hands-on simulator training

Why Register With Us:

  • One CV, worldwide access — our global network means your profile reaches shipowners across Europe, Asia, and beyond

  • All vessel types — tankers, bulkers, containers, offshore vessels, yachts, specialized cargo

  • All ranks — from cadets to masters, from wipers to chief engineers

  • Fast-track application — complete all fields in the registration form and we move your file to active status immediately

  • Local support — talk to a crew coordinator in your time zone, in your language

How It Works:

  1. Register your CV via our online form

  2. We review and activate your profile

  3. We contact you when a matching position opens

  4. You interview directly with the shipowner or through our coordinator

No position right now? No problem. We keep your file active and reach out the moment something fits. The maritime job market moves fast — being in our database means being first in line.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Crew & Payroll Services — Worldwide Maritime Positions (All Ranks, All Vessel Types) at Mercator Crewing

item.description:
Location:
Description:

The Synergy Group offers a wide range of positions on its fleet of oil and also chemical tankers, LPG and LNG carriers, bulk carriers and container ships worldwide. It prides itself in hiring the best seafarers and providing a first-class environment for them to develop and progress their careers.

Always hiring talented people, we take the recruitment process very seriously, and never charge people to join us. Learn more about our procedures here.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Build your future with Synergy at Synergy Marine Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

We are looking for Assistant Crew Operator.
If interested and available, please send your CV.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Assistant Crew Operator – Immediate Opening at marineman.eu
[Gold Job] OPENINGS FOR BULK CARRIER at

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

Choosing your next contract is one of the most important decisions in your career. At NORTADA Shipmanagement, we offer more than just a job; we offer a stable, professional environment where your skills are valued and your well-being is a priority. We are a focused company managing a modern fleet, which means you are a key member of our team—a name, not a number. Join us and build a career with a company that is invested in your success.

When you sail with NORTADA, you benefit from:

  • A Modern, Well-Maintained Fleet: Work on container vessels that are managed to the highest standards of safety and operational readiness.
  • An Unwavering Commitment to Safety: Our certified Safety Management System is our promise to you and your family that your safety is our paramount concern.
  • Genuine Career Advancement: We are committed to developing talent from within. We support your growth through our structured Cadet Program and by prioritizing internal promotions for qualified crew.
  • Stable and Reliable Employment: Our strong commercial management and focused fleet operations ensure reliable contract cycles and enhanced job security.
  • A Culture of Professional Respect: We foster a professional and supportive environment on board and ashore, built on open communication and mutual respect for every member of the team.
We are always seeking qualified, professional, and dedicated seafarers to join the NORTADA team. Please review our current openings below. If you do not see a position that matches your qualifications at this time, we strongly encourage you to submit a general application, as our crewing needs change frequently.


Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Careers with NORTADA at NORTADA SHIPMANAGEMENT LDA

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

Berge Bulk is a global leader in dry bulk shipping, with a growing fleet. Renowned for our leading innovation and decarbonisation efforts, we are poised for an exciting future.

  • SENIOR OFFICERS
  • JUNIOR OFFICERS
  • RATINGS
  • CADETS

To join the Berge Bulk family as a seafarer, simply reach out to one of our manning agents in your region.

  • CHINA
  • INDIA
  • PHILIPPINES
  • EUROPE

APPLY NOW!



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Careers onboard a Berge Bulk ship at Berge Bulk Limited

item.description:
Location: Russia
Description:

Человеческий капитал —  ключевой актив Регистра. Регистр приветствует амбициозных профессионалов, владеющих современными технологиями и стремящихся продолжить развитие отрасли с опорой на опыт предыдущих поколений. Своим сотрудникам Регистр предлагает интересную работу, непрерывное обучение, инструменты построения карьеры и достойный уровень оплаты труда.

Наиболее востребованы специалисты инженерно-инспекторского состава, оказывающие классификационные и конвенционные услуги от имени Регистра.



Основные требования к соискателям в инженерно-инспекторский состав:

  • высшее морское техническое образование
  • опыт на работы на предприятиях судостроения, судоремонта или эксплуатации судов
  • уверенное владение английским языком
  • соответствие ценностям и этическим принципам Регистра

Резюме направлять по адресу:



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Специалисты инженерно-инспекторского состава at Российский морской регистр судоходства

item.description:
Location:
Description:

German Tanker Shipping GmbH & Co. KG is a shipping company founded on 01.01.1998 and based in Bremen. Our fleet consists of 14 modern oil product tankers, all built in Germany. From day one, it has been part of our philosophy to provide our tankers with all-round support as a "genuine" shipping company. Construction supervision, manning, chartering, operations, accounting, financing, IT, payment transactions, insurance, supply of supplies and spare parts, maintenance and inspections as well as the constant monitoring and improvement of all quality and safety standards were and are managed centrally from Eduard-Schopf-Allee in Bremen.

Whether on board or in the office, with us you can expect diverse and challenging tasks in an international environment.

For 25 years we have cherished the promotion and training of our crew on board as well as in the office.

A career on board can also be followed by a career in the office, e.g. in QSSM, IT or Inspection.

INITIATIVE APPLICATION

Haven't found a suitable job and still think that your know how, skills or references are a good fit for us? Initiative applications are welcome.

What we offer

We will provide you with a permanent employment contract, a good working atmosphere both on board and in the office, Scope for personal development, employer-funded health and accident insurance as well as the opportunity to work in a multinational setting. 

Please send your application documents via email to:



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Come on board - INITIATIVE APPLICATION at German Tanker Shipping GmbH
[Gold Job] Senior Sales Executive – Marine & Cruise Logistics (Remote – Worldwide) at
